title: Alex Gibney’s Elon Musk documentary is nearly here and almost four hours long.
summary: It almost wrapped up in 2025, but then… Premiering at the 83rd Venice Film Festival in September, the “hit piece” (according to Elon Musk in 2023) clocks in at 232 minutes .
